judgment.summary: Profitable and growing company with strong margins, trading at a reasonable forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 2.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-12.
positives: Earnings growth 37.1% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 35.4% indicate strong performance.
Profit margin 19.7% and operating margin 25.0% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Return on equity 25.2% shows effective use of shareholder investments.
Free cash flow $9.29B TTM provides significant operational flexibility.
Forward P/E 24.68x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 39.22x, suggesting expected earnings growth.
negatives: Current ratio 0.93 and quick ratio 0.70 suggest potential short-term liquidity challenges.
Total debt $33.00B is higher than total cash $16.64B, though Debt/Equity is manageable at 67.54%.

news.paragraph: CSCO is being highlighted as a potential AI winner in 2026 and a top tech stock by a major portfolio manager, following impressive financial results. The company recently beat earnings estimates for its last reported quarter, and the next earnings date is set for August 12th. Traders should consider the positive sentiment surrounding AI and the company's strong performance as potential catalysts.

headlines.title: Cisco Systems (CSCO): The AI Winner in 2026
Impressive Financial Results Assert Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) as a Top Tech Stock in Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
